scripts.render:examples: npm run render:html -- examples/example.md dist/examples/example.html && npm run render:html -- examples/example.md dist/examples/example-print.html --style packages/html-renderer/styles/print.css
scripts.test: npm run build --silent && node dist/packages/importers/src/cli/importTxt.js packages/importers/fixtures/simple.txt > /tmp/oser-import-test.json && node dist/packages/importers/src/cli/importMarkdown.js packages/importers/fixtures/simple.md > /tmp/oser-import-markdown-test.json && node dist/packages/html-renderer/src/cli/renderHtml.js examples/example.txt /tmp/oser-render-test.html > /tmp/oser-render-test.out && node dist/packages/html-renderer/src/cli/renderHtml.js examples/example.md /tmp/oser-render-markdown-test.html > /tmp/oser-render-markdown-test.out && node dist/packages/html-renderer/src/cli/renderHtml.js examples/example.md /tmp/oser-render-no-style-test.html --style none > /tmp/oser-render-no-style-test.out && node dist/packages/html-renderer/src/cli/renderHtml.js examples/example.md /tmp/oser-render-print-test.html --style packages/html-renderer/styles/print.css > /tmp/oser-render-print-test.out && grep -q 'packages/html-renderer/styles/editorial.css' /tmp/oser-render-markdown-test.html && ! grep -q 'rel="stylesheet"' /tmp/oser-render-no-style-test.html && grep -q 'packages/html-renderer/styles/print.css' /tmp/oser-render-print-test.html && grep -q '' /tmp/oser-render-markdown-test.html && grep -q '
